reply: Karpathy’s framing is useful because it separates hype from workflow. Skills and MCP only matter when they change what builders can repeat daily.
open-design 往视频、图片、音频扩展很顺。设计能力如果能跨模态复用，就不只是网页还原工具了。
The harness angle is the real moat candidate. Models move fast, but repo feedback, review traces, and developer habits are harder to copy.
A local agent writing its own tools is a big shift. It makes the workflow feel less like API calls and more like a small dev environment.
TypeScript support matters. A lot of agent experiments live in JS stacks, and sandbox plus harness control makes them much easier to productionize.
Codex 做剪辑最省的是改版成本。不是一次生成多炫，而是字幕、转场、节奏不满意时能继续用文字改。
Cursor 在前端复现和调试上确实强。Agent 框架的差距，经常体现在遇到细碎 UI 问题时能不能自己追下去。
控制权交给开发者这点很重要。长任务 agent 最怕黑盒，能检查 harness 才能知道它为什么跑偏。
The VM testing loop is the interesting part. Multi-agent software only gets serious when agents can watch simulated users break the product.
右侧嵌 iOS 模拟器这个点很实用。AI 写 App 时最烦的是来回切窗口，看见运行效果会快很多。
Context usage becoming visible is a big deal. Developers need to know what the agent is carrying, not just wait for a weird answer later.
Security review as a harness feature makes sense. The useful product is not a warning banner, it is suggested patches inside the dev loop.
Agent payments change the risk surface immediately. The workflow needs budgets, approvals, receipts, and rollback before it feels safe.
Harness 和 Compute 分开是企业能不能用的分水岭。模型负责干活，但权限、日志、隔离必须另算。
An open-source workspace-agent layer is valuable because teams will want their own models, data boundaries, and deployment choices.
The 300 parallel agents detail is the part to watch. Coding models are becoming less like chat and more like distributed execution systems.
The four questions are a good filter. Cost of error is especially underrated; some agents should never move past draft mode.
多模型切换很适合日常小任务。不是每个步骤都需要 Claude，便宜稳定的 plan 反而能让流程跑得更久。
HTML 动效直接变视频，这个链路很适合 Codex。前端代码本来就有结构，拿来做可重复的视频生产很自然。
模拟器画面串到浏览器，对 AI 写 iOS 很有用。能看见、能点、能复现，调试闭环就短很多。
Local-first and BYOK are the right defaults for design tooling. Teams want artifacts they can inspect, version, and keep.
A free coding model with 256K context is more important for experimentation than headlines suggest. Cheap capacity changes usage habits.
手机管理几百个 Agent 这个画面很强。写代码越来越像排班和巡检，人负责看异常和改方向。
免费 Pro 模型可以先拿来试代码、长文档和小 agent。稳定性确认后，再接进重要流程会稳一点。
Non-coding tasks are where Codex gets interesting. Repos, docs, plans, and verification all have structure an agent can work with.
入门教程会一直有人需要。工具越快，新人越多，能把第一小时讲清楚就很有价值。
剪辑行业会先被模板化部分吃掉。素材整理、字幕、动效和改版都能自动化，人的价值会往审美和选题走。
Remotion 做宣传片很适合 agent。代码化的视频更容易复用同一套节奏和品牌元素，不像传统剪辑那么散。
PPT 丑很多时候确实是没有模板约束。让 agent 选好 HTML 模板，比让它临场发挥审美靠谱。
Scheduled agent employees are a useful frame. The hard part is not running 24/7, it is knowing what they did while you were away.
Cross-device handoff is underrated. Assigning from mobile only works if the desktop agent keeps context and exposes progress clearly.
新手教程反复爆很正常。工具每升级一轮，就会多一批刚进场的人，需要有人把门槛重新讲低。
国产 coding plan 很适合做补位。Claude 不稳或额度紧时，小任务先切过去，主流程不断更重要。
手机发任务、文件自动躺好，这种体验很接近我想要的工作流。人不该守着进度条等 agent。
The app-versus-terminal difference matters for mainstream use. Most people want a persistent workspace, not another CLI ritual.
That timeline explains why everyone is suddenly racing toward agent workspaces. The entry point is becoming as important as the model.
体感差异很正常。不同 harness 对同一个模型影响很大，MiniMax 放进不同环境里表现可能完全不一样。
9 个 Claude Code 代理加调度器，核心不是数量，而是谁负责拆任务、合并结果和发现跑偏。
模型库和网页授权这种更新很实用。对普通用户来说，少一次配置失败，就多一次继续用下去的机会。
扫盲内容还有空间。很多用户还卡在第一层，能把 Claude Code 讲明白的人依然有价值。
排期从 5 天砍到 2 天很真实。AI 把代码速度拉上去后，边界、权限、脏数据这些账还是要人还。
Boris 亲自讲高级用法很值得看。Claude Code 的门槛不在安装，而在会不会把任务和上下文喂对。
给 AI 对话加记忆很有用。很多效率损耗不是模型差，而是每次都要重新解释偏好、项目和禁忌。
Drawing directly on the canvas is the right interaction. Room design needs a fast sketch-revise loop more than another prompt box.
用 Codex 写三维个人主页挺适合副项目。先让页面跑起来，再慢慢调光影、镜头和交互。
Compute providers are quietly becoming part of the AI product stack. The capacity layer is no longer just infrastructure plumbing.
额度重置这种小变化会直接影响使用习惯。限制一松，大家就更愿意把长任务交给 Claude 跑。
微信资料直达 Hermes Agent 这点很适合销售。热单冷单判断本来就依赖上下文，能接进 agent 会很省人力。
闪迪这波提醒很直接：看见硬件需求暴涨时，除了买设备，也该顺手研究供应链里的卖铲子公司。
Credits change behavior fast. Once experimentation feels free, developers start testing workflows they would never pay to try one by one.
